command: for f in docs/schemas/*.json; do echo "=== $(basename $f) ==="; head -25 "$f"; echo ""; done 2>/dev/null | head -100
reason: Read existing schema patterns for ADR template design

command: test -d docs/adr && echo "docs/adr EXISTS" || echo "docs/adr does not exist"; test -d docs/json/adrs && echo "docs/json/adrs EXISTS" || echo "docs/json/adrs does not exist"
reason: Check if target directories already exist
